title: Buzzeap Electric Fly Zapper - Indoor Insect Killer with 20W UV Light, Bug Zapper for Home, Kitchen and Office - Includes 2 Pack Replacement Bulbs (UK Plug)
bullet_points: Effective Insect Control: This bug zapper is equipped with two 10W T8 LED UV light tubes, this 20W indoor insect killer emits a UV light spectrum that mimics natural attractants. This advanced optical design significantly boosts capture rates for mosquitoes, gnats, and flies, ensuring superior indoor pest management even in low-light conditions.

Chemical-Free Extermination: This electric fly zapper with high-voltage grid, effective electric shock to kill bugs like mosquitoes, flies, moths, and gnats without odors, sprays, or toxic residues behind. This chemical-free extermination method eliminates provides a safe and odorless solution for kitchens, bedrooms, and any family living space.

Dense Protective Mesh for Worry-Free Safety: Engineered with a dense protective mesh screen, the outer housing acts as a reliable barrier against accidental contact. This child-safe and pet-friendly design prevents curious fingers and paws from reaching the internal electrical grid while maintaining unrestricted insect entry.

Long-Lasting Performance: Includes 2 free replacement bulbs. The Buzzeap electric fly killer built for residential and commercial use, the energy-efficient LED bulbs boast an extended lifespan of up to 25,000 hours. This reduces the hassle of frequent bulb replacements and ensures the UV light output remains consistently strong, maintaining a reliable protective mesh of defense against flying pests season after season.

Easy-Clean Removable Tray: This fruit fly trap indoors is effortless with the easy-clean, washable removable tray that neatly collects dried insect debris. For versatile placement, the mosquito zapper includes a durable hanging chain, allowing you to suspend it from a hook or simply set it on a countertop or solid surface for optimal coverage.
